title: Mixed Preposition Pairs
description: Practice two prepositional phrases selected from Sets 1–5.

questions.sentence: We met ___ noon ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: We met at noon near the station.
questions.japanese: 駅の近くで正午に会った。

questions.sentence: She arrived ___ Monday ___ her sister.
questions.completedSentence: She arrived on Monday with her sister.
questions.japanese: 彼女は月曜日に姉妹と一緒に到着した。

questions.sentence: We ate ___ class ___ the library.
questions.completedSentence: We ate after class outside the library.
questions.japanese: 授業後、図書館の外で食事をした。

questions.sentence: He practiced ___ an hour ___ the river.
questions.completedSentence: He practiced for an hour beside the river.
questions.japanese: 彼は川のそばで1時間練習した。

questions.sentence: The dog ran ___ the field ___ the woods.
questions.completedSentence: The dog ran across the field into the woods.
questions.japanese: 犬は野原を横切って森へ走り込んだ。

questions.sentence: The package came ___ Osaka ___ Tokyo.
questions.completedSentence: The package came from Osaka via Tokyo.
questions.japanese: 荷物は東京経由で大阪から届いた。

questions.sentence: ___ the rain, we continued ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: despite the rain, we continued toward the station.
questions.japanese: 雨にもかかわらず、駅の方へ進み続けた。

questions.sentence: The film is ___ seeing ___ your classmates.
questions.completedSentence: The film is worth seeing with your classmates.
questions.japanese: その映画はクラスメートと見る価値がある。

questions.sentence: We waited ___ the café ___ noon.
questions.completedSentence: We waited outside the café at noon.
questions.japanese: 正午にカフェの外で待った。

questions.sentence: She walked ___ the bridge ___ the park.
questions.completedSentence: She walked toward the bridge across the park.
questions.japanese: 彼女は公園を横切って橋の方へ歩いた。

questions.sentence: The store opened ___ Friday ___ lunch.
questions.completedSentence: The store opened on Friday after lunch.
questions.japanese: その店は金曜日の昼食後に開店した。

questions.sentence: The museum is ___ the station and ___ visiting.
questions.completedSentence: The museum is near the station and worth visiting.
questions.japanese: その博物館は駅の近くにあり、訪れる価値がある。

questions.sentence: We studied ___ two hours ___ the window.
questions.completedSentence: We studied for two hours beside the window.
questions.japanese: 窓のそばで2時間勉強した。

questions.sentence: He moved ___ the room ___ the noise.
questions.completedSentence: He moved into the room despite the noise.
questions.japanese: 騒音にもかかわらず、彼は部屋の中へ移動した。

questions.sentence: The message came ___ Kyoto ___ email.
questions.completedSentence: The message came from Kyoto via email.
questions.japanese: メッセージはメールで京都から届いた。

questions.sentence: Finish the form ___ Friday ___ class.
questions.completedSentence: Finish the form by Friday before class.
questions.japanese: 授業前の金曜日までに用紙を完成させること。

questions.sentence: We stayed quiet ___ the exam ___ noon.
questions.completedSentence: We stayed quiet during the exam until noon.
questions.japanese: 正午まで試験中は静かにしていた。

questions.sentence: The clock hangs ___ the door ___ the counter.
questions.completedSentence: The clock hangs above the door behind the counter.
questions.japanese: 時計はカウンターの後ろにあるドアの上に掛かっている。

questions.sentence: The bag is ___ the table ___ two chairs.
questions.completedSentence: The bag is under the table between two chairs.
questions.japanese: かばんはテーブルの下で二脚の椅子の間にある。

questions.sentence: We studied ___ the culture ___ the region.
questions.completedSentence: We studied about the culture of the region.
questions.japanese: その地域の文化について学んだ。

questions.sentence: The plane flew ___ the city ___ the clouds.
questions.completedSentence: The plane flew over the city through the clouds.
questions.japanese: 飛行機は雲を通って町の上空を飛んだ。

questions.sentence: She worked ___ a guide ___ summer.
questions.completedSentence: She worked as a guide during summer.
questions.japanese: 彼女は夏の間ガイドとして働いた。

questions.sentence: The cat jumped ___ the sofa ___ the floor.
questions.completedSentence: The cat jumped off the sofa onto the floor.
questions.japanese: 猫はソファーから床へ飛び降りた。

questions.sentence: Submit the report ___ noon ___ the meeting.
questions.completedSentence: Submit the report by noon before the meeting.
questions.japanese: 会議前の正午までにレポートを提出すること。

questions.sentence: The shop ___ the station stayed open ___ midnight.
questions.completedSentence: The shop behind the station stayed open until midnight.
questions.japanese: 駅の後ろにある店は深夜まで営業していた。

questions.sentence: A sign hangs ___ the desk ___ the windows.
questions.completedSentence: A sign hangs above the desk between the windows.
questions.japanese: 標識は窓の間で机の上に掛かっている。

questions.sentence: The road goes ___ the river ___ the valley.
questions.completedSentence: The road goes over the river through the valley.
questions.japanese: 道路は川を越え、谷を通って続いている。

questions.sentence: He spoke ___ team leader ___ the new rule.
questions.completedSentence: He spoke as team leader about the new rule.
questions.japanese: 彼はチームリーダーとして新しい規則について話した。

questions.sentence: The title ___ the book is ___ the picture.
questions.completedSentence: The title of the book is under the picture.
questions.japanese: その本の題名は写真の下にある。

questions.sentence: The cup rolled ___ the shelf ___ the rug.
questions.completedSentence: The cup rolled off the shelf onto the rug.
questions.japanese: カップは棚から敷物の上へ転がり落ちた。

questions.sentence: She has lived ___ Tokyo ___ 2022.
questions.completedSentence: She has lived in Tokyo since 2022.
questions.japanese: 彼女は2022年から東京に住んでいる。

questions.sentence: The road runs ___ the cliffs ___ the coast.
questions.completedSentence: The road runs below the cliffs along the coast.
questions.japanese: 道路は崖の下を海岸に沿って続いている。

questions.sentence: He stood ___ the students ___ the table.
questions.completedSentence: He stood among the students around the table.
questions.japanese: 彼はテーブルを囲む学生たちの中に立っていた。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the station ___ umbrellas.
questions.completedSentence: We walked to the station without umbrellas.
questions.japanese: 傘を持たずに駅へ歩いた。

questions.sentence: The team voted ___ the plan ___ an hour.
questions.completedSentence: The team voted against the plan within an hour.
questions.japanese: チームは1時間以内にその計画に反対票を投じた。

questions.sentence: Music played ___ the event ___ the hall.
questions.completedSentence: Music played throughout the event inside the hall.
questions.japanese: ホールの中で行事中ずっと音楽が流れた。

questions.sentence: The village lies ___ the river ___ the valley.
questions.completedSentence: The village lies beyond the river down the valley.
questions.japanese: 村は川の向こうで谷を下った所にある。

questions.sentence: The bus went ___ the school ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: The bus went past the school to the station.
questions.japanese: バスは学校の前を通り過ぎて駅へ向かった。

questions.sentence: She worked ___ the library ___ the afternoon.
questions.completedSentence: She worked in the library throughout the afternoon.
questions.japanese: 彼女は午後ずっと図書館で働いた。

questions.sentence: The temperature stayed ___ zero ___ Monday.
questions.completedSentence: The temperature stayed below zero since Monday.
questions.japanese: 気温は月曜日から0度以下のままである。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the path ___ the gate.
questions.completedSentence: We walked along the path beyond the gate.
questions.japanese: 門の向こうまで小道に沿って歩いた。

questions.sentence: The dog ran ___ the house ___ the garden.
questions.completedSentence: The dog ran around the house past the garden.
questions.japanese: 犬は家の周りを走り、庭の前を通り過ぎた。

questions.sentence: ___ the players, no one spoke ___ the coach.
questions.completedSentence: among the players, no one spoke against the coach.
questions.japanese: 選手たちの中で、コーチに反対して話す者はいなかった。

questions.sentence: He finished ___ ten minutes ___ help.
questions.completedSentence: He finished within ten minutes without help.
questions.japanese: 彼は助けなしで10分以内に終えた。

questions.sentence: Water flowed ___ the hill ___ the tunnel.
questions.completedSentence: Water flowed down the hill inside the tunnel.
questions.japanese: 水は丘を下り、トンネルの中を流れた。

questions.sentence: Everyone ___ Ken arrived ___ noon.
questions.completedSentence: Everyone except Ken arrived before noon.
questions.japanese: ケン以外は全員正午前に到着した。

questions.sentence: The cloud looked ___ a ship ___ sunset.
questions.completedSentence: The cloud looked like a ship at sunset.
questions.japanese: その雲は日没時に船のように見えた。

questions.sentence: ___ English, she studies French ___ her sister.
questions.completedSentence: besides English, she studies French with her sister.
questions.japanese: 英語のほかに、彼女は姉妹とフランス語も勉強している。

questions.sentence: The keys are ___ the book ___ the drawer.
questions.completedSentence: The keys are underneath the book inside the drawer.
questions.japanese: 鍵は引き出しの中で本の下にある。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the hill ___ the river.
questions.completedSentence: We walked up the hill along the river.
questions.japanese: 川に沿って丘を上った。

questions.sentence: The café ___ the station opened ___ Monday.
questions.completedSentence: The café near the station opened on Monday.
questions.japanese: 駅の近くにあるカフェは月曜日に開店した。

questions.sentence: The express came ___ Nagoya ___ Shizuoka.
questions.completedSentence: The express came from Nagoya through Shizuoka.
questions.japanese: 急行列車は静岡を通って名古屋から来た。

questions.sentence: ___ the rain, we waited ___ the hall.
questions.completedSentence: despite the rain, we waited inside the hall.
questions.japanese: 雨にもかかわらず、ホールの中で待った。

questions.sentence: The cat climbed ___ the tree ___ noon.
questions.completedSentence: The cat climbed up the tree at noon.
questions.japanese: 猫は正午に木を登った。

questions.sentence: Everyone ___ Aya walked ___ the path.
questions.completedSentence: Everyone except Aya walked along the path.
questions.japanese: アヤ以外は全員小道に沿って歩いた。

questions.sentence: The child moved ___ a dancer ___ confidence.
questions.completedSentence: The child moved like a dancer with confidence.
questions.japanese: その子どもは自信を持ってダンサーのように動いた。

questions.sentence: ___ the museum, the temple is ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: besides the museum, the temple is near the station.
questions.japanese: 博物館のほかに、その寺も駅の近くにある。

questions.sentence: The package came ___ Seoul ___ Friday.
questions.completedSentence: The package came from Seoul on Friday.
questions.japanese: 荷物は金曜日にソウルから届いた。

questions.sentence: The cable runs ___ the road ___ the tunnel.
questions.completedSentence: The cable runs underneath the road through the tunnel.
questions.japanese: ケーブルは道路の下を通り、トンネルを抜けている。

questions.sentence: We left ___ lunch ___ the heat.
questions.completedSentence: We left before lunch despite the heat.
questions.japanese: 暑さにもかかわらず、昼食前に出発した。
